---
description: "Use when adding, editing, or reviewing translation message files. Covers the 3-locale rule, key naming, structure consistency, and how translations flow into components."
applyTo: "messages/**/*.json"
---

# i18n / Translation Guidelines

## The Golden Rule

**Any change to user-visible text requires updating ALL THREE locale files:**
- `messages/en.json` — canonical source of truth
- `messages/it.json` — Italian
- `messages/ru.json` — Russian

Never add, rename, or remove a key in one file without doing the same in all three. The key structure must be byte-for-byte identical across all three files.

## Key Naming

- camelCase keys, nested inside a section object.
- Section name matches the component/page it belongs to (lowercase).

```json
{
  "hero": {
    "h1": "...",
    "subtitle": "..."
  },
  "services": {
    "heading": "...",
    "cards": [...]
  }
}
```

- Arrays are allowed for repeated items (e.g. service cards, process steps).
- Never use dot-separated flat keys at the top level.

## Adding a New Section / Page

1. Add the new key block to `en.json` first (write the English copy).
2. Copy the exact same key structure to `it.json` and `ru.json`.
3. Fill in the Italian and Russian translations (use placeholder text if not yet available, mark with `// TODO` comment in a separate note — JSON doesn't support comments, so update promptly).

## Using Translations in Components

Server component:
```tsx
import { useTranslations } from "next-intl";
const t = useTranslations("sectionName");
return <h1>{t("heading")}</h1>;
```

Client component — same import, but the component must render inside the next-intl provider (already wired globally in `src/app/[locale]/layout.tsx`).

For typed array iteration:
```tsx
{(t.raw("cards") as Array<{ title: string; body: string }>).map(...)}
```

## Current Section Keys (en.json)

| Key | Used in |
|-----|---------|
| `metadata` | `src/app/[locale]/layout.tsx` |
| `header` | `Header.tsx` |
| `hero` | `Hero.tsx` |
| `stats` | `Stats.tsx` |
| `services` | `Services.tsx` |
| `founder` | `Founder.tsx` |
| `about` | `About.tsx` |
| `process` | `Process.tsx` |
| `ctaStrip` | `CtaStrip.tsx` |
| `contact` | `Contact.tsx` |
| `newsletter` | `NewsletterSignup.tsx` |
| `footer` | `Footer.tsx` |
| `contactPage` | `src/app/[locale]/contact/page.tsx` |
| `cookieBanner` | `CookieBanner.tsx` |
